title: Muretia fragrantissima
intro:

taxonomy: Muretia fragrantissima is classified within the family Gentianaceae, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as the gentian or gentian family. This family is a part of the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. The order Gentianales is part of the clade Asteridae, which is a large group of flowering plants that also includes the orders Lamiales and Solanales. The clade Asteridae is part of the larger group called the angiosperms, or flowering plants. The angiosperms, in turn, are part of the larger plant kingdom, Plantae.
